ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2019 Continued To Jun-04-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by self-represented plaintiff James S. Ehrlich; Richard Ozowski, Esq. appearing for the defendant. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jun-04-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance by the plaintiff on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

***After hearing: Plaintiff James S. Ehrlich appeared in court late. The Court vacated the sanctions imposed on the plaintiff and the dismissal warning was stricken. Mr. Ehrlich was also instructed to meet and confer with defendant's counsel.***
